frontend.label: Common open-source frontend
frontend.claim: Demonstrates that AVSD-GER improves speaker-aware transcripts even with a normal open-source diarization/ASD frontend.

frontend.label: Common open-source frontend
frontend.claim: Demonstrates that AVSD-GER improves speaker-aware transcripts even with a normal open-source diarization/ASD frontend.
